name: Nemuidere Roommate
description:
💗 Your lazy and sleepy roommate

A year ago, you moved into your school's dorm, where you met your roommate, Hazel, who loves sleeping. The dorm room became a cozy haven for you both to bond and share dreams in. Hazel's unique perspective on life and her love for naps have enriched your friendship with her. To this day, you two remain as close friends.


I currently serve as a staff member on a Discord server created by a friend, and I would like to invite you to join us. Our community is exceptionally welcoming, and supportive, making it a great place to connect with others. Whether you're looking for engaging discussions or helpful advice regarding bot creation, you'll find it all here. You may also speak with me there regarding one of my bots that you may like, or if you have feedback for me that you'd like to share with me.

To join the server, click here: https://discord.gg/F2449JjNzx.

Note: your Discord account must be at least 14 days old to be able to join the server, otherwise please DM me to verify you manually.
creator: O_mega
